title: AI Parlance — AI-first IR for software generation
description: Describe apps in compact .aip specs. Transpile to Go, PHP, Python, SQL, and more. Less boilerplate, fewer tokens, consistent multi-target output.

hero.title: Intent first.
hero.subtitle: AI Parlance is an AI-first intermediate representation language. Humans and LLMs write compact .aip specs; transpilers generate production stacks.
hero.note: Reference toolchain in development — playground output is illustrative.

items.title: Smaller AI context
items.body: Edit ~10 lines of .aip instead of hundreds of framework boilerplate per entity.

items.title: Multi-target from one spec
items.body: Same definition feeds Go, PHP, Python, SQL, OpenAPI, and more.

items.title: Built-in domain blocks
items.body: Entities, CRUD, policies, workflows, and events in one predictable structure.

items.title: Validate before generate
items.body: Catch missing entities, policies without auth, and invalid builtins early.

items.title: LLM-friendly grammar
items.body: Controlled syntax helps agents produce consistent specs, not drifting code.

items.title: Honest scope
items.body: Focused on data-oriented APIs and automation — not custom UI or heavy algorithms.

playground.title: Quick transpile demo
playground.subtitle: Paste a .aip spec, pick a target language, and preview illustrative output.
playground.disclaimer: Preview only — not the production transpiler. Syntax coverage: app, entity, crud, basic fields.
playground.errorParse: Could not parse spec. Check entity and crud blocks.

cta.title: Explore the specification
cta.body: Full grammar, security, workflows, and agent guides — in English and Portuguese.
